news.t: First Trust Global Portfolios Management Limited Announces Distributions for certain sub-funds of First Trust Global Funds plc
VettaFi Indexes Now Underpin Six ETFs in the First Trust Fund Family

holdings.infoBox: DTRE is an equity ETF with a total of 37 individual holdings. The top holdings are Equinix stock at 6.95%, Prologis at 6.73%, American Tower at 6.63%, Digital Realty Trust at 6.56%, and Crown Castle at 6.53%.

overview.description: The First Trust Alerian Disruptive Technology Real Estate ETF (DTRE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund tracks an index of real estate stocks that support wired and wireless communication, data infrastructure, warehouses, and fulfillment centers. Selection and weighting of securities are based on three-month average trading values. DTRE was launched on Oct 3, 2022 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: Alerian Disruptive Technology Real Estate Index

data.title: First Trust Global Portfolios Management Limited Announces Distributions for certain sub-funds of First Trust Global Funds plc
data.text: LONDON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Global Portfolios Management Limited (“FTGPM”) announces the declaration of the quarterly distributions for the following sub-funds of First Trust Global Funds plc...

data.title: VettaFi Indexes Now Underpin Six ETFs in the First Trust Fund Family
data.text: LOS ANGELES--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VettaFi announces further expansion of its relationship with asset manager First Trust, as another First Trust fund starts tracking a VettaFi index.
